calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers Topost Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 14 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 14 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Continued To May-27-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
